_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of hair shaft progenitors that create a niche for hair pigmentation.

_contextSnippet: Strikingly, depletion of SCF in keratinocytes resulted in mice displaying a complete absence of hair pigmentation, beginning at birth...this phenotype was limited to hair pigmentation without affecting the development or growth of hair and the epidermis
details: Complete absence of hair pigmentation beginning at birth when used to delete Scf, with phenotype limited to hair pigmentation without affecting hair development or epidermis
